evals.prompt: Create a bar chart comparing GPT-4, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Gemini Pro on MMLU accuracy (89.2%, 88.7%, 83.7%). Save it as a PNG.
evals.expected_output: A matplotlib bar chart using Anthropic style (white background, PRETTY_CYCLE colors, no top/right spines) with use_anthropic_defaults() called

evals.prompt: Generate a TikZ diagram showing a simple neural network with input layer (3 nodes), hidden layer (4 nodes), and output layer (2 nodes). Save the .tex file.
evals.expected_output: A TikZ .tex file using Anthropic color definitions (slate, ivory, clay, sky) with proper node styling

evals.prompt: Build a small HTML page showing a comparison table of 3 model architectures (Transformer, Mamba, RWKV) with columns for parameters, speed, and memory usage. Save as .html.
evals.expected_output: An HTML file using Anthropic CSS custom properties (--slate, --ivory, --clay) with proper typography
